title: Enhance haunted attraction content: scarier auditions link, new scenic images, Toys sneak peek, and rewritten descriptions

requirements.text: Add a new external “Scream Team Auditions” link (use a placeholder URL created in code) to the Auditions section UI and make the Auditions section feel noticeably scarier through copy and presentation updates (without breaking the existing audition signup dialogs).

quotes: Add the scream team auditions link make it more scarier

acceptanceCriteria: The Auditions section displays a clearly labeled “Scream Team Auditions” link using a placeholder URL defined in the frontend code.
Clicking the link opens the URL in a new tab/window and does not interfere with the existing Scare Actor / Dancer signup flows.
The Auditions section copy/presentation is updated to be more intense/scary while keeping user-facing text in English.

requirements.text: Generate and add a new AI-generated image for the “Clown Town” scenic/interior elevation, store it as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated, and update the Clown Town interior elevation section to use the new generated image.

quotes: add at generation image for clown town
2Yes  create ai generated image for clown town.

acceptanceCriteria: A new Clown Town image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated and is referenced by the UI (not served through the backend).
The “Inside Clown Town” / interior elevation section renders the new image without broken links.

requirements.text: Generate and add an AI-generated “scenic elevation” image for the Terror Hell Hole scene named “Vicky’s Saw”, store it as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated, and surface it in the Hell Hole sneak peek experience with an appropriate title and professional-but-scary English description.

quotes: And a scenic elevation of Terror hell hole haunted scene called Vicky’s Saw

acceptanceCriteria: A new Vicky’s Saw scenic elevation image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated and is referenced by the UI (not served through the backend).
The Hell Hole sneak peek page displays the Vicky’s Saw scenic elevation content (image + title + text) without breaking the existing Hell Hole hero image and description.

requirements.text: Add a “Sneak Peek” experience for the haunted house “Toys Come to Play”: include it as an additional card in the Sneak Peek section and add a dedicated full sneak peek page/route consistent with existing sneak peek pages.

quotes: add a sneak peek inside Toys come to play haunted house

acceptanceCriteria: The Sneak Peek section includes a new card for “Toys Come to Play” with image and text pulled from existing content structures.

Clicking “View Full Sneak Peek” for “Toys Come to Play” navigates to a new dedicated sneak peek page, consistent in layout and back-navigation behavior with existing sneak peek pages (e.g., Clown Town / Hell Hole).
The new Toys sneak peek route is registered in the app router and is reachable via hash navigation.

requirements.text: Rewrite the tagline and description text to be more professional while still scary for every haunted house, scare zone, and food booth defined in the site’s static content modules, keeping all user-facing text in English.

quotes: add each description more professional but scary for every food booth, zone and house
3. Yes write a new professional style but scary descriptions yourself.

acceptanceCriteria: All entries in frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts have updated tagline/description copy in a professional-but-scary tone.
All entries in frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts have updated tagline/description copy in a professional-but-scary tone.

All entries in frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts have updated tagline/description copy in a professional-but-scary tone (menu item names/prices/structure preserved unless only descriptive text is being refined).
No UI renders placeholder/missing text as a result of the rewrites.

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Do not edit files under frontend/immutablePaths (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
Store generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend (do not route images through the backend).
Respect the single-actor backend architecture; no additional backend services.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party authentication providers (Internet Identity only).
Do not add real-time features (e.g., WebSockets).
Do not change unrelated video autoplay/fullscreen features beyond what is required for the requested content updates.

required: Haunted clown-circus interior scenic elevation with distorted funhouse architecture, ominous lighting, and unsettling carnival props (clown-town-interior-elevation-v2.dim_1600x900.jpg)

Dark scenic elevation of an infernal saw-themed chamber with industrial blades, scorched wood/metal textures, dramatic theatrical lighting, and a foreboding altar-like focal point (vickys-saw-scenic-elevation.dim_1600x900.jpg)
